positive: A whimsical and stylized scene featuring a glowing crescent moon nestled amongst bioluminescent wildflowers and stylized constellations. The composition is circular and centered, suitable for a medallion print. Use a deep navy and indigo color palette contrasted with vibrant pops of teal, electric yellow, and soft lilac luminescence. The flora and astronomical elements should have crisp, thick outlines and high contrast, emphasizing clean silhouettes and magical geometry. Studio lighting, vector illustration style, maximalist detail, perfect for screen printing on fabric.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, signature, grain, noisy, low resolution, bad composition, extra limbs, bad anatomy
